events.title: Shakti Bhakti: Kirtan & Cacao
events.description: A weekly Thursday gathering in the intimate Cobra Room at Mudra Cafe, one of central Ubud's most tucked-away community spaces. Anu Karoliina & Friends lead a 90-minute devotional session blending ceremonial cacao with acoustic kirtan — mantras, harmonium, percussion, and the voices of those gathered. The format is participatory and drop-in: arrive, receive the cacao, and let the music carry you. No prior experience needed. Limited to the room's capacity, which keeps it personal and warm.
events.short_description: Weekly Thursday kirtan and cacao ceremony led by Anu Karoliina & Friends in the intimate Cobra Room at Mudra Cafe, central Ubud.
events.venue_address: Jl. Goutama Selatan No. 22, Ubud, Bali
events.price_info: IDR 150,000 early bird / IDR 200,000 at the door

events.title: New Moon Bhakti Kirtan
events.description: A ceremonial evening rooted in devotion: Steven Light and Valentina guide the voices of the gathered into the sacred union of Shiva and Shakti — Kali and Shiva, Radhe and Krishna, Sita and Rama. The evening opens with Bhakti Kirtan at 17:30, weaving ancient Sanskrit mantras and devotional song, then pauses for a communal dinner from organic and locally farmed produce at 19:00. At 20:00 the fire circle opens — a ceremonial space for intentions, prayers, and musical sharing in free flow. Presale IDR 220,000 / door IDR 320,000.
events.short_description: A Bhakti Kirtan evening of devotional song, organic dinner, and ceremonial fire circle at School of Unified Healing, Ubud.
events.venue_address: Jl. Subak Sok Wayah, Ubud, Bali
events.price_info: IDR 220,000 presale / IDR 320,000 at the door
